install_fields.label: Personal Auth Token
install_fields.help: Your Bugsnag Personal Auth Token. Find it at Settings → My account → Personal auth token.

install_fields.label: Organization Slug
install_fields.help: The slug of your Bugsnag organization. Find it in the URL after /organizations/ or in Settings → Organization.

description: Syncs Bugsnag projects, errors (crash reports), and releases into the Shielva knowledge base for AI-powered error analysis and incident response.

apis.name: Sync
apis.description: Sync projects and top errors (per project) from Bugsnag.

apis.name: List Projects
apis.description: Fetch all projects for the organization via offset pagination.

apis.name: List Errors
apis.description: Fetch errors for a project via X-Next-Page-Link pagination.

apis.name: Get Error
apis.description: Return a single raw Bugsnag error by project_id and error_id.

apis.name: List Releases
apis.description: Fetch releases for a specific project.

apis.name: List Collaborators
apis.description: Fetch all collaborators for the organization.

name: BugsnagConnector
